slides.title: Mostly *low intensity*
slides.body: Walking and zone 2 won't hurt recovery.

slides.title: Lift *first*
slides.body: Do cardio after lifting or on off days.

slides.title: Don't go *overboard*
slides.body: Hours of cardio eats muscle. Stay moderate.

slides.title: Just *walk*
slides.body: 8k steps a day covers most of it.

slides.title: Eat back the *burn*
slides.body: Eat enough to support the extra output.

slides.title: Cardio, *handled*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your steps and training in one place.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
